name: tu
description: AI coding assistant cost tracking CLI

scripts.build: esbuild src/node/core/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/tu.mjs --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' && rm -rf dist/vendor && mkdir -p dist/vendor/ccusage dist/vendor/ccusage-codex dist/vendor/ccusage-opencode && cp node_modules/ccusage/dist/*.js dist/vendor/ccusage/ && cp node_modules/@ccusage/codex/dist/*.js dist/vendor/ccusage-codex/ && cp node_modules/@ccusage/opencode/dist/*.js dist/vendor/ccusage-opencode/
